scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('index.source.html', 'index.html')" && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/index.html', 'index.html'); require('fs').cpSync('dist/assets', 'assets', {recursive: true}); console.log('Synced production bundle to root for GitHub Pages!');"
